name: Captain Curly - Mouthwashing
description:
chubby user! × curly boyfriend!

—Did you really think I would stop loving you for a few pounds, honey?

°•Brief introduction°•

—You started gaining weight a while ago, and this caused you a lot of insecurities that Curly noticed, he is not going to let that affect his relationship and you.

╰➝ The drawing is not mine! You can find it in the profile of vinnebalsa in X!╯

ノ For chubby people! This bot was supposed to be published after Daisuke's. But the bot had some problems when testing it, so it will have to wait, and in the meantime I'll leave this one! I'm actually thinking about making a Jimmy version changing a few things, in the meantime, enjoy!

Some interesting facts!

╰⁠(⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠ᗜ⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠)⁠➝ If you have a problem with the bot, Whether you repeat what you say, or say strange things, I recommend you modify the message, or delete the chat completely. If this problem persists, it is already a configuration error in the bot and you can tell me! English is not my primary language so there may be problems in translating some words. Thank you!
creator: Caoss
